---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit and how often?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can — UI behavior, API shape, configuration options, etc.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why did you prefer the proposed solution?

## Additional context

Any references, mockups, prior art in other apps, or constraints we should know about.
